feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: availability button no response in me51n
entry.content:
Dear expert:

       When create purchase requisition with item category ' ' or purchase requisition with item category 'U' by t-code ME51N, Click button "availability" in source of supply tab, the system doesn't have any response and doesn't display availability. Could you please check availability function. how can show this function of availability in source of supply tab, Require which setting in system.  Screenshot as below:

   Standard  PR 

STO PR

thank you

entry.title: How to create Mass Output Condition records in Sales and Billing output ( Vv11 and VV31) in SAP S/4
entry.content:
Hi I am looking for solution how can we create 2000 Sales output condition records in Sales and Biling document ( VV11 and VV31 ) in SAP system

I tried LSMW but LSWM is not available in SAP S/4 , so looking for alternative and Standard solution to create mass Output condition records for Sales /Billing document in SAP S/4.

 

Thanks

entry.title: Object type definition for an outbound IDoc
entry.content:
Hi,

We are using an output sent from several docs (SO, PO, Outbound delivery and inbound one), output that creates an IDoc which transmits some info to the transportation team.

Those IDocs can be seen in the so-called 'GOS' or Services for Object, window that can either be called when in a doc via the 'System' menu -> Services for Object and 'Display relationships' or be defaulted with the PUID 'SD_SWU_ACTIVE' value X in SU3 and the relationships submenu in that window.

And this works well for the SO, for the PO, for the OBD, but not for the inbound one.

I understood why (see that post), the issue is caused by the object type created by the IDoc in table SRRELROLES.

The object type for the IDoc created for the SO is BUS2032, the one for the PO IDoc is BUS2012, the one for the OBD IDoc is LIKP.

And the one for the IBD IDoc is LIKP too, what is causing the issue.

I copied in SRRELROLES table the line for one IBD IDoc and changed the object type to BUS2015, and the IDoc is now visible in the GOS window.

I tried to find where the object type could be defined for a processing FM, an IDoc type, a message function and a message variant (to not negatively impact the working behaviour for the OBD IDoc), but I wasn't successful (I thought having found the right thing with WE57, but that didn't work).

Any idea how I could define the object type for my IDoc, message function and message variant?

Maybe I missed something 'before' WE57.

Thanks for your help.

BR

Yan

entry.title: DRC eDocument Cockpit – Export Invoice Process Error
entry.content:
In the SD module, an order is created, a delivery is created and an invoicing document is created. This document is then sent to the Turkish Revenue Administration as an EXPORT invoice. When the EXPORT process is completed, the accounting document of the SD invoicing document is created.

How to send an EXPORT invoice for which no accounting document has been created for eDocument?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to Create Return order with reference to Billing doc using FM: SD_ADV_RETURNS_CREATE
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

           I'm using  FM SD_ADV_RETURNS_CREATE to create a Return order. 

           The Reason , I want to use this FM is because it consists Return Reason, Follow up Activity,Refund Control, Cust.Insp.Code and Refund type fields and these are required fields.

But  I'm unable to figure out where Billing document number need to be filled. I have tried providing Billing doc no. in Document field. But system is throwing error "s sls_lord 006 invoice required as template"

Your help will be much appreciated.

Regards,

Sandeep

entry.title: 項目庫存在同法人不同工廠和利潤中心間做STO
entry.content:
印度不同邦間項目庫存移轉

場景：

同法人，不同邦，不同利潤中心，不同工廠，不同項目，不同WBS

需要開AP AR

如果進行STO作業

entry.title: Manage Settlement Rules - Projects in SAP S4HANA Public edition - how to retrieve the list?
entry.content: Could you please help me find the list of settlement rules in S4HANA Public? In the on-premise version, I used SQVI with the tables PRPS and COBRB - COBRA to generate this report, which included the WBS Element and the associated Settlement Cost Center. The standard T-Code for this in on-premise was KOSRLIST_PR.

entry.title: Is integration of C4C with S4/HANA by 3rd party middleware possible?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
is it possible, to safely connect C4C wits S/4HANA with 3rd party middleware (e.g. Mapforce)?

Yes, SAP recommends using CPI, but it is off the table.
On C4C Help site, "Technical Connectivity Guide " and "Integration Guide for Custom Data " are broken.
All information I could find, are only about CPI based integration.

If answer is Yes, please elaborate 🙂

Best regards,
Adam

entry.title: Entry of results in Scientific Notation format
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Entry of control results in "scientific notation" format, is it possible?

It is necessary to allow the entry of results in Scientific Notation format.

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Workflow Approval via Mobile Phone
entry.content:
One thing we do A LOT  is spend time approving workflows for spend.  Whether that's purchase requisition, purchase order, or supplier invoice approval, we spend a lot of time clicking and reviewing in RISE S/4HANA PCE


We have been exploring options to get an SAP mobile app out there to accomplish this.

This would be a major efficiency for us and a technological advantage (should be automatic in today's age of AI), but what would SAP is the fastest route to accomplish this?

entry.title: Automatic storage based on storage bin type
entry.content:
Hello SAP community, 

As part of the receiving process via Warehouse Management (WM), I'm having problems with the automatic allocation of bins based on a storage bin type (Carton, Pallet, etc...).

When the inbound delivery is modified with a view to creating the storage task, a carton HU is created, but when I create the warehouse task, the system is unable to determine the destination bin, even though it is set up so that only cartons can be stored there.

We want the system to automatically suggest locations bin that meet the storage criteria defined in advance.

Please find below my various settings :

CBC :

               1. Define Storage Bin Types

               2. Define HU Types for Each Storage Type

               3. Define HU Types for Each Storage Bin Type

               4. Assign Storage Bin Types to Storage Types

               5. Maintain Storage Types

SAP WM :

    1. Warehouse Monitor

              2. Change Inbound Deliveries

              3. Warehouse task

Could you help me to understand why SAP has not found a location and is placing the goods in the clarification zone by default ?

Thank you

entry.title: Product Bundle usage in Service contract SC1
entry.content:
Dear All,

In our Machining Solution Business, we have a Service Contract process that Our Contract is a bundle of several contract items.

Example: Platinum Contract have 1. Annual maintenance for 5 Years, Priority Service for next 2 years, Free Inspection every 3 months, 24/7 Support for next 1 year.

We have created this as a product bundle in SAP namely Service_Platinum.

Now, the requirement is to enter the Product Bundle as higher level item in Service contract and expectation is that the BOM should be exploded and show the sub items.

Relevant Configurations in Item Categories 'BOM Explosion' checked and Item Category determination is done accordingly to populate the Main item and Sub item. Still the Sub item is not auto populated.

So, Would like to check with you experts if the Product bundle in the Service contract is applicable for SC1 Contract type?

We did not consider Service Contract template since Our contracts are created from Solution Quotation. We cannot able link the Service contract template in Solution quotation for our Contract item. 

Request your guidance. Many thanks.

Girish

entry.title: SAP Subscription Billing S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a customer that has SAP Subscription Billing, S/4HANA Public Cloud solution in place. 

For the integration part they have Salesforce integration with SAP Subscription Billing and S/4.

One clarification I have here is we are facing lot of challenges with SAP Subscription Billing having Event Broker, replication issues in place and customer wants to go live in a couple of months which is not realistic to happen for these issues to be resolved.

The products that this customer have has all the subscription services they do but is there a way we can skip using Subscription Billing and directly create Subscriptions using API calls in S/4? First question is, is this possible and second question is how to approach this subscriptions items till invoicing? Because I tried by creating a sales order or sales contract, but system didn't allow because there was no assigned combination of item category maintained for the subscription items.

Please advise on the above. @stefan_kiene @shpresimshabaj 

SAP Subscription Billing SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Thanks,

Brinda S

entry.title: Freely definable attributes in Customer master (KATR1-KATR10)
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are using SAP S/4 Public Cloud Edition and customer wanted to maintain their current system account ID in any one of the customer master data fields available in SAP Business Partner, I know that there are 10 freely defined attributes can be configured, but what is the length of these attribute value? Customer has account ID which is maximum of 30 characters. Is it possible to use these attribute fields for this?

Please advise.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA business partner SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales 

Thanks!

entry.title: fiscal year variant VD is not defined for calendar year 1900 Message No. fgv002
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

Recently we've done upgrade from 1809 to 2022.

Encountered error in Q4H “Fiscal Year Variant VD is not defined for calendar year 1900 message no. FGV002” during F-90, AW01N and /AGRI/FMCO88 posting for Bearer AUCs.

We've never faced error in Q41. Kindly let us know the solution on this on upgraded system Q4H.

entry.title: PO line item wise mass conditon update
Question about how to post odata api using build apps
entry.content:
Hi!

I'm creating a application on build apps,trying to get the data from excel file and transfer those data to s4hana using odata api_sales_order_srv.

I've successfully create the btp connection and also make a get request using the api.

But when i try to post those data, i got error like "Enter a document number between 0005000000 and 0005999999". I followed this page to create the post body.(Try Out | Sales Order (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub)

I'm wondering how to deal with this error since the data entity do not have a "doucument number" column.

Hope to get some help.Thanks in advance

entry.title: How can we have the all options in the Fiori App MM12?
entry.content:
Dear all

I face a problem.

The options under MM12 in the APP Fiori are not available.

When I want to paste a list of material to implemented the date change in MM12 under Fiori app, I don't have the option. The sytem only let me to paste material one by one.

Is there an action to do to have the same behaviour as on the MM12? Do we have an app that permite to schedule the change in the material master in mass mode?

Thank you

Ingrid

entry.title: BP - ADD TAX CATEGORY
entry.content: Our requirement  is how to check mandatory field in BP ( S4 Hana) tax category - GSTIN Feild- Control data tab  )

entry.title: How to add new fields into line item for an Manage sales order app in s/4 hana
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

Greetings,

For one of requirement, I need to add new fields into Line Items of SAP Manage sales order app.
May I know how do I achieve this either using developer extensibility or classic extensibility.?

if developer extensibility I tried adding new fields they are placing at custom fields tab, but I need those fields into line-Item table.

 

Regards,
Hiriyappa
